title: leucas montana var. angustifolia
intro: Leucas montana var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved Leucas, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Leucas montana var. angustifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of cold and flu. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
